TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pasumaq, title = Pasumaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasumaq} }

S.FORM: Pasumaq Itiniay i Shizi Cen no Pingtung ko Pasumaq a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 339 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 320 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 19 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 92%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: paso~u~uma* itiniaj i sńßi*i ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u paso~u~uma* a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, ro~u~ukai *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, amis *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Pasumaq Itiniay i Shizi Cen no Pingtung ko Pasumaq a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 339 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 320 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 19 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 92%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: paso~u~uma* itiniaj i sńßi*i ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u paso~u~uma* a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, ro~u~ukai *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, amis *%, ro~uma *%.
